sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url_col STRING, num_col INT);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, url_col, num_col) VALUES (1, 'https://example.com', 16);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, url_col, num_col) VALUES (2, 'invalid_url', NULL);
SELECT id, right_shift(num_col, 2) AS shifted, url 'https://www.example.com/' AS valid_url FROM test_data WHERE num_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, right_shift(COALESCE(num_col, 0), 2) AS shifted, url 'https://www.example.com/' AS valid_url FROM test_data WHERE url_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, right_shift(num_col, 2) AS shifted FROM test_data WHERE url_col = url 'https://example.com' AND num_col = (SELECT MAX(num_col) FROM test_data);
SELECT id, right_shift(num_col, 2) AS shifted, COALESCE(url 'https://fallback.com', url_col) AS fallback_url FROM test_data GROUP BY id, shifted HAVING shifted > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_data_2 (ref_id INT REFERENCES test_data(id), additional_url STRING);
SELECT t1.id, right_shift(t1.num_col, 1) AS shifted, t2.additional_url FROM test_data t1 JOIN test_data_2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t1.num_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, right_shift(CAST(url_col AS STRING), 2) AS shifted FROM test_data WHERE url_col IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, url_col, num_col) VALUES (3, '', 0);
SELECT id, right_shift(num_col, 2) AS shifted FROM test_data WHERE url_col IS NULL OR url_col = '';
SELECT id, right_shift(num_col, 2) FROM (SELECT id, num_col FROM test_data WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_data));
